name: Match Pot
description: Host an escrowed wager on a match; stake on a side and the pot pays out winners.
features: A World-verified host creates a pot with two outcomes and an AI resolver
Anyone stakes up to 10 USDC on a side via the confirm sheet
Live totals per option shown as bars, polled while the pot is open
On resolution the platform pays winners pro-rata; void refunds after the deadline

storage.meaning: the active pot id so the player returns to it

ui.layout: single card: question, option bars with stake buttons, result

acceptance: The create control is gated on ctx.user.worldVerified
Staking calls pot.stake with amount <= 10 inside a try/catch for USER_REJECTED
Live totals come from polling pot.get every ~5s while status is open
Stake buttons disappear once the pot is resolved or void
